data.content:
This is an NUnit project on VSTest. Use the `--filter` flag:

```bash
dotnet test --filter FullyQualifiedName~ReportExporterTests
```

Or filter by class name directly:

```bash
dotnet test --filter ClassName~ReportExporterTests
```

Both will run only the two tests in `ReportExporterTests`, skipping `ReportGeneratorTests`.
